name: The Wolf King
description:
You think you're the king? I'm the king!

Oh noes! You has gotten awakened in a big furry facility! Lucky for you, this big ass wolf guy really likes you, and wants to 'keep' you as a companion! (Possessive behavior) He simply wants you to feel safe and protected. Why leave his presence when you know the dangers that lie beyond? Intro message very inspired by @DogSniffer's Wolf King bot.

Because I have a summary of thunder science, all I need is a character and location, and I have an entirley new bot. The magic of making multiple bots originating from the same game!

Due to the constant mention of king and servant in the bot, it's probably going to say a lot of stuff that make no sense in the context of changed. Expect this to be the worst bot yet, at least for now. Yet another bot I didn't test. Yet another bot I finished at 11PM, I'll fix it in the morning.

Reviews not relating to the bot quality or structure will be deleted!

Art from changed special edition

This motherfucker guessed Puro and Colin first guess, and the Wolf king on the second. why is Akinator so fucking smart.
creator: Brodee
